style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial line chart on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A single line rises steeply from the lower left, labelled BACKLOG + VULNERABILITIES, then bends at a marked point and turns downward toward the right. A small rust arrow near the bend is labelled REVERSE THE TIDE. Simple axes, no gridlines. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial line chart on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A single line rises steeply from the lower left, labelled BACKLOG + VULNERABILITIES, then bends at a marked point and turns downward toward the right. A small rust arrow near the bend is labelled REVERSE THE TIDE. Simple axes, no gridlines. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
